uplink.description: T1_MECA_10MN frame: cumulative energy index + 8 ten-minute increments (most recent 1500 W)
uplink._note: Synthetic T1_MECA_10MN frame (header 0x48, 21 bytes): 4-byte big-endian index then 8 uint16 interval increments. expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle: index 100000, power = increment*60/step = 250*6 = 1500 W). index Wh -> metering.energy.total; most-recent derived power -> power.active; powers/increments kept as extras. Satisfies power-meter.
Headers outside the fixed-step MECA/T2/START set are not normalized by this codec.
